learn.core_idea: Preemption relies on timer interrupts to keep CPU ownership bounded and maintain responsiveness.
mechanism_steps: Kernel records proc.preempt and requeues process.
learn.worked_example: Two long jobs show repeated preempt-dispatch cycles before exit.
common_mistakes: Confusing block transitions with preempt transitions.
Ignoring timer-driven nature of the event.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can distinguish block vs preempt in trace.
I can confirm completion remains intact.
